name: Sophia L.
text: "My skin barrier is genuinely repaired after four weeks. The texture is extraordinary — melts in, no residue. First product that actually delivers what the label promises."

name: Amara O.
text: "Finally a foundation shade range that includes me. Espresso is a perfect match. Lightweight, breathable, and it lasts all day without touch-ups."

name: Mei C.
text: "The shade quiz was eerily accurate. Recommended Honey and it's my perfect match. Packaging is so beautiful I display it on my vanity like a luxury object."
